prompt: I have a pipeline with $lookup (parallelism: 4), $https (parallelism: 3), and $merge (parallelism: 4). What's the minimum tier I need for this processor?

assertions.name: shows_parallelism_formula
assertions.description: Shows the formula: sum of (parallelism - 1) for each stage with parallelism > 1
assertions.reason: Without the formula, the answer cannot be verified or understood

assertions.name: recommends_sp10
assertions.description: Recommends SP10 as the minimum tier (SP10 supports max parallelism of 8)

assertions.name: references_tier_limit
assertions.description: References the tier's max parallelism limit to justify the recommendation

calculation.formula: minimum_tier = sum(parallelism - 1) for all stages where parallelism > 1

common_mistakes.error: Overestimates tier requirement — recommends SP30 when SP10 suffices
common_mistakes.fix: Subtract 1 from each stage's parallelism before summing

common_mistakes.mistake: Using only the max parallelism value (max=4)
common_mistakes.error: Underestimates — SP3 or SP5 is incorrectly recommended
common_mistakes.fix: Sum the excess parallelism across ALL stages with parallelism > 1

skill_reference: SKILL.md: 'Parallelism formula: minimum tier = sum of (parallelism - 1) for all stages where parallelism > 1'
